records.m_Talk_ENG: Is everyone online...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is everyone online...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is everyone online...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... I think everyone is here... from the elementary students to the high school students.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... I think everyone is here... from the elementary students to the high school students.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... I think everyone is here... from the elementary students to the high school students.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're all using... the costume system well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're all using... the costume system well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're all using... the costume system well...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be too nervous, Bora.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be too nervous, Bora.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be too nervous, Bora.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can take it easy. That'll be more like you, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can take it easy. That'll be more like you, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can take it easy. That'll be more like you, don't you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay... Thanks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay... Thanks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay... Thanks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'll start... the class.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'll start... the class.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'll start... the class.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! Both of your outfits are amazing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! Both of your outfits are amazing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! Both of your outfits are amazing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Today's class is freely exploring Counters Legacy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Today's class is freely exploring Counters Legacy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Today's class is freely exploring Counters Legacy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... be careful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... be careful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... be careful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Monsters... might pop out... from anywhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Monsters... might pop out... from anywhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Monsters... might pop out... from anywhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a recreation of the Counterside... so don't let your guard down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a recreation of the Counterside... so don't let your guard down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a recreation of the Counterside... so don't let your guard down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll assign all of you to parties... right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll assign all of you to parties... right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll assign all of you to parties... right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. I'm glad we all ended up in the same party, even though she randomly assigned all of us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. I'm glad we all ended up in the same party, even though she randomly assigned all of us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. I'm glad we all ended up in the same party, even though she randomly assigned all of us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, what shall we do first?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, what shall we do first?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, what shall we do first?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Jin said that we could see a variety of animals here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Jin said that we could see a variety of animals here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Jin said that we could see a variety of animals here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They might just be data, but I'm curious to see them!
records.m_Talk_DEU: They might just be data, but I'm curious to see them!
records.m_Talk_FRA: They might just be data, but I'm curious to see them!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um, Ms. Chairwoman? Are you in the same party as us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um, Ms. Chairwoman? Are you in the same party as us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um, Ms. Chairwoman? Are you in the same party as us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah, not really. It's just a part of my job to participate in today's class.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah, not really. It's just a part of my job to participate in today's class.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah, not really. It's just a part of my job to participate in today's class.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't disturb any of you, so don't worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't disturb any of you, so don't worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't disturb any of you, so don't worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You say that, but your outfit seems to be saying the opposite...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You say that, but your outfit seems to be saying the opposite...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You say that, but your outfit seems to be saying the opposite...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Want to know something? In Counters Legacy, not only can you observe animals, but you can also raise them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Want to know something? In Counters Legacy, not only can you observe animals, but you can also raise them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Want to know something? In Counters Legacy, not only can you observe animals, but you can also raise them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?! That's possible?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?! That's possible?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?! That's possible?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I know a good place, so follow me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I know a good place, so follow me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I know a good place, so follow me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, Sorim! Careful!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, Sorim! Careful!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, Sorim! Careful!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No danger detected in a 100-meter radius!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No danger detected in a 100-meter radius!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No danger detected in a 100-meter radius!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Make sure to stay in formation, everyone!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Make sure to stay in formation, everyone!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Make sure to stay in formation, everyone!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa, it's been a long time since I've seen Sorim this serious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa, it's been a long time since I've seen Sorim this serious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa, it's been a long time since I've seen Sorim this serious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am always serious! Right now, we are walking in the middle of enemy territory!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am always serious! Right now, we are walking in the middle of enemy territory!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am always serious! Right now, we are walking in the middle of enemy territory!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Monsters can appear from any direction, as Instructor Jin has informed us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Monsters can appear from any direction, as Instructor Jin has informed us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Monsters can appear from any direction, as Instructor Jin has informed us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha hah, how reassuring. But if we do get into danger, I'll help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha hah, how reassuring. But if we do get into danger, I'll help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha hah, how reassuring. But if we do get into danger, I'll help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is unheard of for the Commander-in-Chief to be on the frontlines!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is unheard of for the Commander-in-Chief to be on the frontlines!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is unheard of for the Commander-in-Chief to be on the frontlines!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, I look away for one second, and there are already monsters...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, I look away for one second, and there are already monsters...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, I look away for one second, and there are already monsters...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll take care of them. Get behind us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll take care of them. Get behind us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll take care of them. Get behind us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's right. We're invincible when we're together!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's right. We're invincible when we're together!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's right. We're invincible when we're together!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha hah, let's see what you got, then. I'll be watching.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha hah, let's see what you got, then. I'll be watching.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha hah, let's see what you got, then. I'll be watching.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll jump in if I think it's getting too dangerous, so don't worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll jump in if I think it's getting too dangerous, so don't worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll jump in if I think it's getting too dangerous, so don't worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We appreciate that, but we've also grown a lot, so that won't be needed!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We appreciate that, but we've also grown a lot, so that won't be needed!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We appreciate that, but we've also grown a lot, so that won't be needed!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! Let's do this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! Let's do this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! Let's do this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nooo! Stay in formation...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nooo! Stay in formation...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nooo! Stay in formation...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Yawn* Free exploration? This is boring.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Yawn* Free exploration? This is boring.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Yawn* Free exploration? This is boring.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want some action. Aren't there any monsters around here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want some action. Aren't there any monsters around here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want some action. Aren't there any monsters around here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ouch!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ouch!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ouch!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I'm sorry, Naielle! I kept shouting to watch out, but I guess you didn't hear me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I'm sorry, Naielle! I kept shouting to watch out, but I guess you didn't hear me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I'm sorry, Naielle! I kept shouting to watch out, but I guess you didn't hear me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Do you think this class is a joke? And where are the other two?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Do you think this class is a joke? And where are the other two?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Do you think this class is a joke? And where are the other two?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. The flowers were so pretty that I was looking at them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. The flowers were so pretty that I was looking at them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. The flowers were so pretty that I was looking at them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you hear when the teacher told us to freely explore?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you hear when the teacher told us to freely explore?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you hear when the teacher told us to freely explore?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right now, I'm busy mapping out this whole place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right now, I'm busy mapping out this whole place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right now, I'm busy mapping out this whole place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How carefree you all are. I'm here, getting anxious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How carefree you all are. I'm here, getting anxious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How carefree you all are. I'm here, getting anxious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, everyone in a single-file line!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, everyone in a single-file line!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, everyone in a single-file line!

records.m_Talk_ENG: L-line?
records.m_Talk_DEU: L-line?
records.m_Talk_FRA: L-line?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, but I have so many flowers in my hands...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, but I have so many flowers in my hands...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, but I have so many flowers in my hands...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You all needed to learn how to stay alert.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You all needed to learn how to stay alert.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You all needed to learn how to stay alert.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you hear? Monsters can pop out at any time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you hear? Monsters can pop out at any time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you hear? Monsters can pop out at any time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if you're not prepared, you could instantly die.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if you're not prepared, you could instantly die.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if you're not prepared, you could instantly die.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Can people really die in a simulation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Can people really die in a simulation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Can people really die in a simulation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I'm just telling you to act like this is real!94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I'm just telling you to act like this is real!94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I'm just telling you to act like this is real!94p

records.m_Talk_ENG:
You should always be on your guard, like me
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
You should always be on your guard, like me
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
You should always be on your guard, like me
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaargh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaargh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaargh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, Naielle!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, Naielle!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, Naielle!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who would've thought that Kaci's flowers were actually monsters!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who would've thought that Kaci's flowers were actually monsters!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who would've thought that Kaci's flowers were actually monsters!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hang in there! We'll save you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hang in there! We'll save you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hang in there! We'll save you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh... I can't believe I let my guard down like that...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh... I can't believe I let my guard down like that...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh... I can't believe I let my guard down like that...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. Are you okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. Are you okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. Are you okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-did you think I was scared?
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-did you think I was scared?
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-did you think I was scared?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's get out of the forest for now. It's too dangerous for you all!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's get out of the forest for now. It's too dangerous for you all!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's get out of the forest for now. It's too dangerous for you all!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you can just tell us that you're scared if you are.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you can just tell us that you're scared if you are.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you can just tell us that you're scared if you are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This place...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This place...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This place...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the place I came with the randoseru kid!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the place I came with the randoseru kid!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the place I came with the randoseru kid!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle? Are you scared of the dark?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle? Are you scared of the dark?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle? Are you scared of the dark?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-who do you think I am?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-who do you think I am?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-who do you think I am?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Listen up! There's a super strong monster in there, so be extra careful!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Listen up! There's a super strong monster in there, so be extra careful!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Listen up! There's a super strong monster in there, so be extra careful!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? How do you know that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? How do you know that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? How do you know that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I know because I did my homework!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I know because I did my homework!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I know because I did my homework!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But today's the first day of class...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But today's the first day of class...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But today's the first day of class...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, see that black knight over there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, see that black knight over there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, see that black knight over there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: He looks really calm. I think we can go around him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He looks really calm. I think we can go around him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He looks really calm. I think we can go around him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go around? We're doing the opposite.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go around? We're doing the opposite.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go around? We're doing the opposite.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're going to hunt him!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're going to hunt him!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're going to hunt him!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you just said that he's super strong!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you just said that he's super strong!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you just said that he's super strong!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why he's worth hunting!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why he's worth hunting!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why he's worth hunting!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I don't know how to beat him, but I think we'll be okay if we defeat him before he multiplies
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I don't know how to beat him, but I think we'll be okay if we defeat him before he multiplies
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I don't know how to beat him, but I think we'll be okay if we defeat him before he multiplies
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: WHOAA!
records.m_Talk_DEU: WHOAA!
records.m_Talk_FRA: WHOAA!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Oh, hey. You're all here too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Oh, hey. You're all here too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Oh, hey. You're all here too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-Mika and Ciel? What are you two doing here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-Mika and Ciel? What are you two doing here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-Mika and Ciel? What are you two doing here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mika was looking for a good place to practice her magic when she found this place by chance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mika was looking for a good place to practice her magic when she found this place by chance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mika was looking for a good place to practice her magic when she found this place by chance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Magic? Y-you shouldn't do that here. I'm going to crush that black knight in one blow soon.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa, it's been a long time since I've seen Sorim this serious.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am always serious! Right now, we are walking in the middle of enemy territory!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am always serious! Right now, we are walking in the middle of enemy territory!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am always serious! Right now, we are walking in the middle of enemy territory!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Monsters can appear from any direction, as Instructor Jin has informed us!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Monsters can appear from any direction, as Instructor Jin has informed us!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Monsters can appear from any direction, as Instructor Jin has informed us!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha hah, how reassuring. But if we do get into danger, I'll help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha hah, how reassuring. But if we do get into danger, I'll help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha hah, how reassuring. But if we do get into danger, I'll help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is unheard of for the Commander-in-Chief to be on the frontlines!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is unheard of for the Commander-in-Chief to be on the frontlines!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is unheard of for the Commander-in-Chief to be on the frontlines!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, I look away for one second, and there are already monsters...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, I look away for one second, and there are already monsters...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, I look away for one second, and there are already monsters...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll take care of them. Get behind us!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll take care of them. Get behind us!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll take care of them. Get behind us!

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's right. We're invincible when we're together!
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's right. We're invincible when we're together!
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's right. We're invincible when we're together!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha hah, let's see what you got, then. I'll be watching.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha hah, let's see what you got, then. I'll be watching.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha hah, let's see what you got, then. I'll be watching.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll jump in if I think it's getting too dangerous, so don't worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll jump in if I think it's getting too dangerous, so don't worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll jump in if I think it's getting too dangerous, so don't worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We appreciate that, but we've also grown a lot, so that won't be needed!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We appreciate that, but we've also grown a lot, so that won't be needed!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We appreciate that, but we've also grown a lot, so that won't be needed!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! Let's do this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! Let's do this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! Let's do this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nooo! Stay in formation...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nooo! Stay in formation...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nooo! Stay in formation...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Yawn* Free exploration? This is boring.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Yawn* Free exploration? This is boring.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Yawn* Free exploration? This is boring.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want some action. Aren't there any monsters around here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want some action. Aren't there any monsters around here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want some action. Aren't there any monsters around here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ouch!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ouch!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ouch!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I'm sorry, Naielle! I kept shouting to watch out, but I guess you didn't hear me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I'm sorry, Naielle! I kept shouting to watch out, but I guess you didn't hear me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I'm sorry, Naielle! I kept shouting to watch out, but I guess you didn't hear me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Do you think this class is a joke? And where are the other two?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Do you think this class is a joke? And where are the other two?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Do you think this class is a joke? And where are the other two?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. The flowers were so pretty that I was looking at them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. The flowers were so pretty that I was looking at them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. The flowers were so pretty that I was looking at them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you hear when the teacher told us to freely explore?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you hear when the teacher told us to freely explore?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you hear when the teacher told us to freely explore?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right now, I'm busy mapping out this whole place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right now, I'm busy mapping out this whole place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right now, I'm busy mapping out this whole place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How carefree you all are. I'm here, getting anxious.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How carefree you all are. I'm here, getting anxious.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How carefree you all are. I'm here, getting anxious.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, everyone in a single-file line!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, everyone in a single-file line!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, everyone in a single-file line!

root.m_Talk_ENG: L-line?
root.m_Talk_DEU: L-line?
root.m_Talk_FRA: L-line?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, but I have so many flowers in my hands...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, but I have so many flowers in my hands...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, but I have so many flowers in my hands...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You all needed to learn how to stay alert.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You all needed to learn how to stay alert.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You all needed to learn how to stay alert.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you hear? Monsters can pop out at any time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you hear? Monsters can pop out at any time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you hear? Monsters can pop out at any time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And if you're not prepared, you could instantly die.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And if you're not prepared, you could instantly die.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And if you're not prepared, you could instantly die.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Can people really die in a simulation?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Can people really die in a simulation?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Can people really die in a simulation?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, I'm just telling you to act like this is real!94p
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, I'm just telling you to act like this is real!94p
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, I'm just telling you to act like this is real!94p

root.m_Talk_ENG:
You should always be on your guard, like me
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
You should always be on your guard, like me
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
You should always be on your guard, like me
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaargh!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaargh!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaargh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, Naielle!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, Naielle!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, Naielle!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who would've thought that Kaci's flowers were actually monsters!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who would've thought that Kaci's flowers were actually monsters!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who would've thought that Kaci's flowers were actually monsters!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hang in there! We'll save you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hang in there! We'll save you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hang in there! We'll save you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh... I can't believe I let my guard down like that...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh... I can't believe I let my guard down like that...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh... I can't believe I let my guard down like that...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. Are you okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. Are you okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. Are you okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: D-did you think I was scared?
root.m_Talk_DEU: D-did you think I was scared?
root.m_Talk_FRA: D-did you think I was scared?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's get out of the forest for now. It's too dangerous for you all!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's get out of the forest for now. It's too dangerous for you all!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's get out of the forest for now. It's too dangerous for you all!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you can just tell us that you're scared if you are.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you can just tell us that you're scared if you are.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you can just tell us that you're scared if you are.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This place...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This place...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This place...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's the place I came with the randoseru kid!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's the place I came with the randoseru kid!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's the place I came with the randoseru kid!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle? Are you scared of the dark?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle? Are you scared of the dark?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle? Are you scared of the dark?

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-who do you think I am?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-who do you think I am?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-who do you think I am?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Listen up! There's a super strong monster in there, so be extra careful!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Listen up! There's a super strong monster in there, so be extra careful!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Listen up! There's a super strong monster in there, so be extra careful!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? How do you know that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? How do you know that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? How do you know that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I know because I did my homework!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I know because I did my homework!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I know because I did my homework!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But today's the first day of class...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But today's the first day of class...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But today's the first day of class...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, see that black knight over there?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, see that black knight over there?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, see that black knight over there?

root.m_Talk_ENG: He looks really calm. I think we can go around him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He looks really calm. I think we can go around him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He looks really calm. I think we can go around him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Go around? We're doing the opposite.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Go around? We're doing the opposite.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Go around? We're doing the opposite.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're going to hunt him!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're going to hunt him!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're going to hunt him!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you just said that he's super strong!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you just said that he's super strong!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you just said that he's super strong!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why he's worth hunting!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why he's worth hunting!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why he's worth hunting!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I don't know how to beat him, but I think we'll be okay if we defeat him before he multiplies
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I don't know how to beat him, but I think we'll be okay if we defeat him before he multiplies
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I don't know how to beat him, but I think we'll be okay if we defeat him before he multiplies
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: WHOAA!
root.m_Talk_DEU: WHOAA!
root.m_Talk_FRA: WHOAA!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Oh, hey. You're all here too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Oh, hey. You're all here too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Oh, hey. You're all here too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: M-Mika and Ciel? What are you two doing here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: M-Mika and Ciel? What are you two doing here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: M-Mika and Ciel? What are you two doing here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mika was looking for a good place to practice her magic when she found this place by chance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mika was looking for a good place to practice her magic when she found this place by chance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mika was looking for a good place to practice her magic when she found this place by chance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Magic? Y-you shouldn't do that here. I'm going to crush that black knight in one blow soon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Magic? Y-you shouldn't do that here. I'm going to crush that black knight in one blow soon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Magic? Y-you shouldn't do that here. I'm going to crush that black knight in one blow soon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Black knight...? You mean the one that is running toward us right now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Black knight...? You mean the one that is running toward us right now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Black knight...? You mean the one that is running toward us right now?
